style_guide: Painted kid-friendly spy adventure, festive warm light, readable objects, no text inside generated images.

assets.prompt: A cheerful New Year festival square for a children's spy adventure English-learning game, with lanterns, a music stage, clothing stalls, festive lights, a decorated archway exit, open walkable foreground, no readable text.
Transparent-background prop sheet for a children's spy adventure New Year festival level: colorful festival hat, clothes bundle, hand drum, fireworks envelope, glowing festival arch marker, no text.

assets.decision: Reuse the polished existing guide spritesheet until a dedicated Host Lina sheet can match the same quality and walk-cycle constraints.

integration_note: The background and interactive prop atlas are generated project assets. The guide sheet is an explicit reuse decision, not a missing generated output.
